scripts.preinstall: sh -c 'rm -f package-lock.json yarn.lock; case "$npm_config_user_agent" in pnpm/*) ;; *) echo "Use pnpm instead" >&2; exit 1 ;; esac'
scripts.build: pnpm run typecheck && pnpm -r --if-present run build
scripts.typecheck: pnpm run typecheck:libs && pnpm -r --filter "./artifacts/**" --filter "./scripts" --if-present run typecheck
scripts.check:merge-conflicts: sh -c "if grep -rnE '^(<<<<<<<|=======|>>>>>>>)' . --exclude=pnpm-lock.yaml --exclude-dir=.git --exclude-dir=node_modules; then echo 'Unresolved merge conflict markers found.' >&2; exit 1; fi"
scripts.check:website-deploy: pnpm run check:merge-conflicts && pnpm run typecheck:libs && pnpm run check:sitemap && pnpm --filter @workspace/website build
